cadence_note: UN-Habitat publishes no refresh schedule for the Urban Indicators Database. The corpus is a set of ArcGIS Hub dataset records (file-geodatabase exports and FeatureServer layers) whose item `modified` timestamps move irregularly — years apart for the historical CPI/governance layers, occasionally for the indicator and population-projection tables. There is no incremental data API, so every refresh is a full-corpus re-download of ~36 specs; quarterly keeps the catalog current without re-pulling static geodatabases weekly.
